'''Orellon I''' was the [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of [[Orellon II]]. When first discovered, it was thought to be a [[Planet/Legends|planet]], hence its misnomer.

==Appearances==
*{{JournalCite|2|The Prophecy}} {{1st}}
